notes: All 15 responses are faithful transcriptions of the visible form with zero fabricated content — every deviation is a misread of visible text (key_misses, not hallucinations). Recurring OCR weak spots across the whole set: the registry email domain (correct registrodelapropriedad.org is almost always rendered registradodelapropiedad.org with an extra 's', or broken with a space), the Nº Entrada digit (correct 11656 read as 11636 by most), the handwritten applicant name (Joan Almiñana Moropsa garbled in every rep), the Domicilio number (n°19 read as '4-19' in every rep), and the last finca (32871 read as 32811 in roughly half the reps). t0.4|rep2 is the single best run, uniquely capturing all four fincas; the higher-temp (t0.7) reps trend slightly worse on the numeric serial fields (Nº Entrada / titular ID digit-dropping).
